label: Mycelium sky — FBM contour lines replace radial glow
notes: Full sky rewrite. Technique: 2-pass domain warp (q→r) then FBM contour lines at two scales. Large filaments: fract(field*7 + pulse) with w=0.042 smoothstep. Fine network: fract(field2*5 - pulse*0.6) with w=0.055 at 0.45x weight. Pulse = sin(t*0.75)*0.022 — threshold drifts so filaments flicker (synaptic firing quality). Very slow warp drift (t*0.025 max) — mycelium lives in slow time. Near-black background (0.01,0.02,0.06), teal filaments (0.06,0.28,0.44), near-white tips (0.62,0.88,0.96). No light source — Act 2 DESCENSION register: living texture, alien, organic.

operations.note: Full rewrite — mycelium FBM contour lines replace radial glow + breathing Snell window
operations.before: exp(-r*3.0) radial glow + breathing Snell rim + slow cloud fbm
